task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login using admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the fee sheet or codes configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the administration page for configuring billing codes, fee sheets, or services (e.g., Administration -> Codes or similar menu).

task_completion.description: Set the code type to CPT4
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'CPT4' is selected from a dropdown menu or entered into the code type field for the new billing code.
The number '99458' is typed into the code input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the billing code
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field contains 'Remote physiologic monitoring treatment mgmt, each addl 20 min' (or at minimum contains the keywords: remote, physiologic, monitoring, 20).

task_completion.description: Set the fee to $42.00 and ensure it is active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fee/price/standard charge field is set to '42.00' (or 42) and any status dropdown or checkbox indicates the code is 'active'.

task_completion.description: Save the new billing code to the fee sheet configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message is displayed, or the code '99458' is visible in the saved list of configured codes/fee sheet items.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface to add the code
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and LibreHealth UI forms, rather than a terminal window executing SQL database commands or backend scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual LibreHealth EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows a valid local or hosted LibreHealth instance, and the interface matches a genuine EHR system rather than a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows a logical progression of typing into fields and clicking buttons, rather than jumping straight to a modified DOM showing the final code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected billing code is 99458. The code type must be CPT4. The fee should be $42.00 (allowable tolerance of 0.5). The description must include the keywords: 'remote', 'physiologic', 'monitoring', and '20' (derived from the official AMA description for CPT 99458: 'Remote physiologic monitoring treatment management services, each additional 20 minutes').
